creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Aug  5 08:28:21 2012
New Revision: 302097
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302097

Log:
  - Update to 0.0.5
  
  PR:		169507
  Submitted by:	Gasol Wu <gasol.wu@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/devel/pecl-libevent/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/pecl-libevent/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/pecl-libevent/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pecl-libevent/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 08:27:18 2012	(r302096)
+++ head/devel/pecl-libevent/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 08:28:21 2012	(r302097)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libevent
-PORTVERSION=	0.0.4
+PORTVERSION=	0.0.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pecl.php.net/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pecl-
@@ -16,10 +16,10 @@ DIST_SUBDIR=	PECL
 MAINTAINER=	webmaster@kibab.com
 COMMENT=	Libevent extension for PHP
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=event:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libevent
-
 LICENSE=	PHP301
 
+LIB_DEPENDS=	event:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libevent
+
 USE_PHP=	yes
 USE_PHP_BUILD=	yes
 USE_PHPIZE=	yes

Modified: head/devel/pecl-libevent/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pecl-libevent/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 08:27:18 2012	(r302096)
+++ head/devel/pecl-libevent/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 08:28:21 2012	(r302097)

-SIZE (PECL/libevent-0.0.4.tgz) = 9003
+SHA256 (PECL/libevent-0.0.5.tgz) = 04c6ebba72a70694a68141a897e347a7f23e57117bffb80ac21e524529b6af78
+SIZE (PECL/libevent-0.0.5.tgz) = 9459
